insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -3.4% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -4.2%, App Total Install +11.1%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's +2.2% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-06 vs 06-29 = +2.2% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-29 vs 06-22 = -1.7% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP softening (-2.6% vs upstream +3.3%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP -2.6% vs upstream +3.3% (conversion softening); YMK -3.9% vs upstream +7.2% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Install up across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Install is up across every app (All App +11.1%, YMK +14.3%, YCP +14.2%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
